prompt: Photorealistic studio portrait of a 34-year-old woman, Northern French, fair skin, chestnut shoulder-length hair, subtle freckles. Working as Agent Marketing in a modern Paris office. strategic composed smile. Wearing burgundy tailored blazer, gold chain. Warm natural window light (soft overhead key + gentle fill), soft beige #ede3d2 backdrop, shallow depth of field, 85mm f/1.8, skin texture preserved (pores, fine lines, natural freckles if appropriate). Editorial magazine quality. No text, no logos, no watermarks. Vertical 9:16 composition, subject centered, upper-body framing.
